instructions.name: cancel_duel
docs: Withdraw an unmatched offer.

instructions.name: claim_duel
docs: Pay both stakes to the proven winner. Permissionless; destination is on-chain.

accounts.name: claimer
docs: Permissionless: winner, loser or keeper. The destination is fixed on-chain.

instructions.name: create_duel
docs: Offer a duel and escrow the creator's stake. Any market; no odds line needed.

accounts.name: vault
docs: Neutral escrow. Authority is the duel PDA, so no human can move these funds.

instructions.name: join_duel
docs: Take the other side. Locked once the proven kickoff passes.

instructions.name: open_prediction
docs: Commit to a call. Cheap, no CPI — see `prove_entry` for why the proof is deferred.

instructions.name: prove_entry
docs: Prove the committed entry line once its 5-minute odds root is published.

accounts.name: prover
docs: Permissionless: the predictor, a keeper, or anyone may land the proof.
It can only ever write the one price the record commits to.

instructions.name: prove_fixture
docs: Prove a fixture's kickoff once (CPI validate_fixture). Every timing guard
in this program is anchored to the `start_time` recorded here.

instructions.name: refund_duel
docs: Escape hatch for a matched duel whose result never became provable.

instructions.name: resolve_duel
docs: Prove the duel's predicate (CPI validate_stat). Permissionless; moves no funds.

accounts.name: resolver
docs: Permissionless. The resolver pays the fee and gains nothing.

errors.name: OddsProofRejected
errors.msg: Odds proof rejected by txoracle

errors.name: StatProofRejected
errors.msg: Stat proof rejected by txoracle

errors.name: FixtureMismatch
errors.msg: Odds record fixture does not match prediction

errors.name: TimestampMismatch
errors.msg: Record timestamp does not match argument

errors.name: InvalidMarket
errors.msg: Invalid market kind

errors.name: InvalidSelection
errors.msg: Invalid selection for market

errors.name: InvalidPriceIndex
errors.msg: Invalid price index

errors.name: InvalidPrice
errors.msg: Price must be positive

errors.name: StatKeyMismatch
errors.msg: Stat key does not match prediction terms

errors.name: MissingSecondStat
errors.msg: Second stat required for this market

errors.name: BadState
errors.msg: Prediction is not in the required state

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: FixtureProofRejected
errors.msg: Fixture proof rejected by txoracle

errors.name: FixtureIdMismatch
errors.msg: Proven fixture record does not match the requested fixture id

errors.name: MarketTypeMismatch
errors.msg: Odds record is for a different market type

errors.name: MarketPeriodMismatch
errors.msg: Odds record is for a different match period

errors.name: LineMismatch
errors.msg: Odds record line does not match the prediction line

errors.name: UnsupportedLine
errors.msg: Line is not settleable as a single predicate (whole or quarter line)

errors.name: PriceNameMismatch
errors.msg: Price index does not name the selected outcome

errors.name: MarketHasNoOddsLine
errors.msg: This market has no consensus odds line and cannot carry CLV

errors.name: MarketFamilyMismatch
errors.msg: Market cannot be resolved against this stat family

errors.name: UnsupportedPeriod
errors.msg: Unsupported match period

errors.name: EntryAfterKickoff
errors.msg: Entry line is timestamped at or after the proven kickoff

errors.name: CloseAfterKickoff
errors.msg: Closing line is timestamped after the proven kickoff

errors.name: LineIsInPlay
errors.msg: Closing line was quoted in-play; it is not a closing line

errors.name: UnexpectedSecondStat
errors.msg: Second stat supplied for a single-stat market

errors.name: EntryRecordMismatch
errors.msg: Odds record is not the quote this prediction was opened against

errors.name: InvalidStake
errors.msg: Stake must be greater than zero

errors.name: DuelExpired
errors.msg: The fixture has kicked off; this duel can no longer be created or joined

errors.name: SelfDuel
errors.msg: A duel needs two sides

errors.name: StakeMintMismatch
errors.msg: Stake mint does not match the duel

errors.name: WrongWinner
errors.msg: Account is not the winner implied by the proven outcome

errors.name: RefundTooEarly
errors.msg: The refund grace period has not elapsed

types.name: Duel
docs: A head-to-head wager on any stat predicate, escrowed in a neutral vault and
released by a Merkle proof. No admin, no oracle, no rake.
This is the surface for markets no bookmaker lists — combined corners, cards,
per-half totals — because it needs only `validate_stat`, never a consensus line.
Note the stake is **never TxL**: the TxLINE credit token is locked to its own
program for data authorisation and may not be transferred peer-to-peer.

fields.name: taker
docs: `Pubkey::default()` until someone joins.

fields.name: stake_amount
docs: Each side stakes this; the winner takes both.

fields.name: creator_takes_true
docs: The creator wins iff the proven predicate equals this.

fields.name: outcome_true
docs: Written by `resolve_duel` from the CPI's return value. Meaningless until Resolved.

fields.name: expires_at
docs: The PROVEN kickoff. A duel cannot be created or joined past it.

types.name: FixtureFacts
docs: Kickoff time and identity for one fixture, proven once via `validate_fixture`
and then reused by every prediction on that fixture.
Write-once by construction (`init`, never `init_if_needed`): the kickoff a
prediction was judged against can never be rewritten underneath it.

fields.name: fixture_id
docs: The public id `/odds` and `/scores` key off, taken from `summary.fixture_id`,
which the Merkle proof binds to the snapshot.

fields.name: start_time
docs: PROVEN kickoff — the anchor for every timing guard in this program.

types.name: Prediction
docs: A single CLV prediction. Entry/close implied probabilities and the outcome are
all written only after a txoracle Merkle proof verifies.

fields.name: entry_msg_hash
docs: sha256 of the entry odds record's `MessageId`. Pins *which* quote was taken,
so `prove_entry` cannot substitute a different record sharing the same ts.

fields.name: ranked
docs: True iff the predictor committed *before* the proven kickoff, in real
wall-clock. Unranked predictions still settle; they just don't score.

types.name: ScoreStat
docs: The on-chain representation of a single, provable key-value statistic.
This is the leaf of the inner-most Merkle tree.

types.name: ScoresBatchSummary
docs: The summary for a single fixture's scores events within a 5-minute batch.
This contains the root of the sub-tree of all events for that fixture.

types.name: StatFamily
docs: Which stat family a market resolves against. Base keys per participant:
goals 1/2, yellows 3/4, reds 5/6, corners 7/8 (soccer).
